case_title: ROBINSON, GLORIA vs. MOORE, RITA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA MOORE, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1054 INGERSON AVE, S.F, CA. $490.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.50, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA MOORE, RONALD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RONALD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RONALD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA MOORE, RONALD
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, RITA MOORE, RONALD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, GLORIA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL.PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. PLS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1045 INGERSON. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED `TO 7-31-93, MIDNIGHT. $490.50 RENT & DAMAGES W/THE RE- MAINDER FORGIVEN. DEFS. WARRANT THEY ARE THE ONLY ADULTS IN POSSESSION. $400 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE RETURNED TO DEF. BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
